test_step: Navigate to /auth/login; Enter username 'sysadmin' and password 'password'; Click Login button; Wait for redirect
expected_result: Redirected to /console/dashboard; Dashboard KPI cards are visible; Sidebar shows System menu with Tenant, Permission, Role, User, Option, Module Authorization, Module Registry sub-items; No access-denied errors

test_step: Navigate to /console/system/tenant; Wait for page to load
expected_result: Tenant list page loads; Table visible with columns: Name, Code, Status, Created At; Search input visible; Add Tenant button visible

test_step: Navigate to /console/system/module-registry; Wait for page to load
expected_result: Module Registry page loads; Table shows all registered modules with ID, name, version, category, status; Add Module and Edit actions visible

test_step: Navigate to /console/system/module-authorization; Wait for page to load
expected_result: Module Authorization page loads; Tenant selector/dropdown visible; Module list with authorization toggles visible

test_step: Navigate to /console/system/user; Wait for page to load
expected_result: User list page loads; Table shows users with username, fullname, email, status columns; Add User button visible

test_step: Navigate to /console/system/role; Wait for page to load
expected_result: Role list page loads; Table shows roles: SYSADMIN, ADMIN, MANAGER, CASHIER at minimum; Add Role button visible; Each row has view/edit actions

test_step: Navigate to /console/system/tenant; Click Add Tenant; Fill Name field with 'Toko Maju Jaya'; Fill Code field with 'tmj'; Set Status to 'active'; Click Save; Wait for success notification
expected_result: Tenant created successfully; Success notification appears; New tenant 'Toko Maju Jaya' appears in tenant list with code 'tmj' and status 'active'; Tenant detail page shows all entered information

test_step: Navigate to /console/system/tenant; Click on 'Toko Maju Jaya'; Wait for detail page to load
expected_result: Tenant detail page shows: Name=Toko Maju Jaya, Code=tmj, Status=active; Edit and Delete buttons visible

test_step: Navigate to /console/system/tenant; Click on 'Toko Maju Jaya'; Click Edit; Change Name to 'Toko Maju Jaya - Pusat'; Click Save; Wait for success notification
expected_result: Tenant name updated to 'Toko Maju Jaya - Pusat'; Success notification appears; Tenant list and detail page reflect new name; Tenant code and status unchanged

test_desc: Full CRUD - Authorize modules for tenant
test_step: Navigate to /console/system/module-authorization; Select tenant 'Toko Maju Jaya - Pusat' from dropdown; Enable modules: location-management, tax-configuration, product-catalog, approval-engine, supplier-management, purchase-order, grn, supplier-return, pos, transfer, inventory-management, report; Wait for each toggle to save
expected_result: All selected modules show as authorized (toggle ON) for the tenant; Changes persist after page refresh; No error notifications appear

test_step: Navigate to /console/system/tenant; Click on 'Toko Maju Jaya - Pusat'; Click Edit; Change Status from 'active' to 'inactive'; Click Save; Wait for success notification
expected_result: Tenant status changes to 'inactive'; Tenant list shows 'inactive' status badge; Success notification appears

test_desc: Full CRUD - Verify inactive tenant cannot log in
test_step: Open a new private/incognito browser window; Navigate to /auth/login; Enter credentials for a user belonging to the 'tmj' tenant; Click Login
expected_result: Login fails with an appropriate error message (Tenant inactive or access denied); User is NOT redirected to the dashboard; No authentication token issued

test_step: Navigate to /console/system/tenant; Click on 'Toko Maju Jaya - Pusat'; Click Edit; Change Status to 'active'; Click Save; Wait for success notification
expected_result: Tenant status changes back to 'active'; Success notification appears; Tenant login should now succeed again

test_step: Navigate to /console/system/user; Click Add User; Fill Fullname with 'Budi Santoso'; Fill Username with 'budi.santoso'; Fill Email with 'budi@tmj.co.id'; Fill Password with 'SecurePass123'; Set Status to 'active'; Click Save; Wait for success notification
expected_result: User created successfully; Success notification appears; 'budi.santoso' appears in user list with status 'active'; User detail page shows all entered information

test_step: Navigate to /console/system/role; Click Add Role; Fill Role Code with 'SUPERVISOR'; Fill Display Name with 'Store Supervisor'; Click Save; Wait for success notification
expected_result: Custom role 'SUPERVISOR' created; Appears in role list; Role detail page shows SUPERVISOR code and display name; No permissions assigned by default

test_step: Navigate to /console/system/user; Click on 'budi.santoso'; Click Reset Password button; Enter new password 'NewPass456!'; Confirm password; Click Save; Wait for success notification
expected_result: Password reset successfully; Success notification appears; User can now log in with the new password; Old password no longer works

test_step: Navigate to /console/system/user; Click on 'budi.santoso'; Click Edit; Change Status to 'inactive'; Click Save; Wait for success notification
expected_result: User status changes to 'inactive'; Success notification appears; User cannot log in while inactive

test_desc: Full CRUD - Create and edit system option
test_step: Navigate to /console/system/option; Click Add Option; Fill Key with 'maintenance_mode'; Fill Value with 'false'; Fill Description with 'Global maintenance mode flag'; Click Save; Wait for success notification; Click on the new option; Click Edit; Change Value to 'true'; Click Save
expected_result: Option created with key=maintenance_mode, value=false; Edit succeeds; Updated value shows 'true' in option list; Option detail reflects new value

test_desc: Full CRUD - Revoke module authorization from tenant
test_step: Navigate to /console/system/module-authorization; Select tenant 'Toko Maju Jaya - Pusat'; Find 'moka-migration' module; Toggle it OFF; Wait for save confirmation; Log in as tenant ADMIN for 'tmj'; Attempt to navigate to /console/modules/moka-migration
expected_result: Toggle saves successfully; When logged in as tenant ADMIN: moka-migration module is NOT visible in sidebar; Navigating directly to the URL returns module-not-authorized error or redirects to dashboard

test_step: Navigate to /console/system/tenant; Create a test tenant with Name='Test Tenant Delete' and Code='ttd'; Navigate to the new tenant detail; Click Delete; Confirm deletion in the dialog
expected_result: Tenant is permanently deleted; Success notification appears; 'Test Tenant Delete' no longer appears in tenant list; The 'ttd' code becomes available for reuse

test_desc: Edge Case - Duplicate tenant code rejected
test_step: Navigate to /console/system/tenant; Click Add Tenant; Fill Name with 'Another Shop'; Fill Code with 'tmj' (already exists); Set Status to active; Click Save
expected_result: Form submission fails; Error message indicates tenant code 'tmj' is already taken; No new tenant is created; User stays on the add form with the error highlighted

test_desc: Edge Case - Tenant code with invalid characters rejected
test_step: Navigate to /console/system/tenant; Click Add Tenant; Fill Name with 'Bad Code Shop'; Fill Code with 'TMJ PUSAT' (contains space and uppercase); Set Status to active; Click Save
expected_result: Form submission fails; Error message indicates code must be lowercase with no spaces; No tenant created; Alternatively the frontend prevents invalid characters from being typed

test_step: Navigate to /console/system/user; Click Add User; Fill Fullname with 'Duplicate User'; Fill Username with 'sysadmin' (already exists); Fill Password with 'TestPass1'; Set Status to active; Click Save
expected_result: Form submission fails; Error message indicates username 'sysadmin' is already taken; No new user created; User stays on form with error

test_desc: Edge Case - SYSADMIN bypasses all module permission checks
test_step: Log in as sysadmin; Navigate to any module URL (e.g., /console/modules/pos/transaction); Navigate to /console/modules/report/dashboard; Navigate to /console/modules/inventory-management
expected_result: All pages load without access-denied errors; SYSADMIN can access every screen in the application regardless of module authorization settings

test_desc: Edge Case - Disabling module in registry affects all tenants
test_step: Navigate to /console/system/module-registry; Find the 'report' module; Click Edit; Set Status to 'inactive'; Save; Log in as any tenant ADMIN; Navigate to /console/modules/report/dashboard; Re-enable the module afterward (set status back to active)
expected_result: When module registry status is inactive: Tenant ADMIN cannot access the report module (module-not-authorized or 404 error); After re-enabling in registry: Tenant ADMIN can access the module again

test_desc: Edge Case - Health check endpoint returns correct status
test_step: Open browser or API client; Send GET request to /api/health; Observe response JSON
expected_result: Response returns HTTP 200 with JSON: { status: 'healthy', services: { database: 'up', redis: 'up' }, tenantConnections: {...} }; If any service is down, status shows 'degraded' and HTTP 503

test_desc: Edge Case - Tenant data isolation verified
test_step: Log in as SYSADMIN; Create two tenants: 'Tenant A' (code=ta1) and 'Tenant B' (code=tb1); Log in as Tenant A ADMIN; Create a product 'Exclusive Product A'; Log in as Tenant B ADMIN; Navigate to product catalog
expected_result: Tenant B cannot see 'Exclusive Product A' from Tenant A; Each tenant's data is completely isolated; No cross-tenant data leakage visible in any list or search

test_desc: Edge Case - Re-authorizing previously revoked module restores access
test_step: Navigate to /console/system/module-authorization; Revoke 'pos' module from tenant 'Toko Maju Jaya - Pusat'; Verify tenant ADMIN cannot access POS; Re-authorize 'pos' for the tenant; Log in as tenant ADMIN again
expected_result: After revoking: POS module not visible in sidebar; After re-authorizing: POS module visible in sidebar and fully functional; No data loss occurred during revoke/re-authorize cycle
